# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { ReadableStream } from 'stream/web';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    const { content, headers = {} } = await req.json();
    
    // Validate input
    if (!content || typeof content !== 'string') {
      return new Response('Invalid content', { status: 400 });
    }

    // Validate headers - only allow specific safe headers
    const allowedHeaders = new Set(['content-type', 'cache-control', 'etag']);
    const sanitizedHeaders: Record<string, string> = {};
    
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
      if (typeof key === 'string' && typeof value === 'string' && allowedHeaders.has(key.toLowerCase())) {
        sanitizedHeaders[key] = value;
      }
    }

    // Create readable stream from content
    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const readable = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          // Simulate streaming by splitting content into chunks
          const chunks = content.split('\n');
          for (const chunk of chunks) {
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk + '\n'));
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 10));
          }
          controller.close();
        } catch (error) {
          controller.error(error);
        }
      }
    });

    return new Response(readable, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
        'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked',
        ...sanitizedHeaders
      }
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Streaming error:', error);
    return new Response('Internal Server Error', { status: 500 });
  }
}
